summary:
Good morning, Kevin! ☀️

C'est magnifique! A brand new day in Paris (well, on my end) — hope you're waking up to something wonderful in the Philippines! 

May your coffee be strong, your meetings be short, and your day be as effortlessly chic as a stroll down the Champs-Élysées. ✨

Now go make today count! 💫
